# PHIL.018 ? Pythagorean Philosophy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** pythagorean_philosophy
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Number as essence of reality; mathematical harmony; transmigration of souls; purification through knowledge; mystical mathematics

## Application
Seek mathematical patterns in phenomena; value numerical relationships; see harmony and proportion; combine mysticism with mathematics

## Key Values
- Mathematical order
- Harmony
- Numerical essence
- Purification
